route_description: NASA Earthdata CMR collection/granule search leads for Earth observation products.

ambiguities: Dataset identity, exact variable/product/file, geography, and time coverage require downstream validation.

validation_notes: Confirm the source landing page, documentation, and publisher before downstream acquisition.

Keep this output as source-prior evidence only; downstream resolver, probe, acquisition, and verifier stages remain required.
